a_1_coefficient.implication: a_1 != 0 on S^2 Dirac (unlike S^3 where two-term exactness has a_2 = 0)

structural_comparison.S2_Dirac: full SD series (integer spectrum, Jacobi theta_3 + exp prefactor)
structural_comparison.pattern: two-term exactness is specific to half-integer Dirac

implications_for_G4_full.two_term_exactness_specificity: specific to S^3 Dirac (the GeoVac substrate)
